entry_point.FQNAME: top.stillmisty.xiantao.domain.user.enums.CultivationRealm CultivationRealm(java.lang.String realmName, int startLevel, int endLevel, java.lang.String earlyStage, java.lang.String midStage, java.lang.String lateStage, java.lang.String peakStage, int earlyLayers, int midLayers, int lateLayers, int peakLayers, java.lang.String description, java.lang.String breakthroughMessage)

problem.problem_class: 方法形参始终具有相同的值
problem.description: 形参 peakStage 的值始终为 '"圆满"'
